/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -rdynamic -O3 -g -std=c++11 -lpthread -Wall -Wno-deprecated -Werror -Wno-dev -Wno-unused-function  -shared -Wl,-soname,libcharon.so -o ../lib/libcharon.so CMakeFiles/charon.dir/charon/log.cc.o CMakeFiles/charon.dir/charon/util.cc.o CMakeFiles/charon.dir/charon/thread.cc.o CMakeFiles/charon.dir/charon/coroutine.cc.o CMakeFiles/charon.dir/charon/scheduler.cc.o CMakeFiles/charon.dir/charon/io_scheduler.cc.o
